message:
feat(freeze): Add get_private_field opcode Zig support

Convert get_private_field opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode gets a private field value from an object.

Stack effect: [obj, name] -> [val]

Implementation:
- Pops name and obj from stack
- Calls JS_FrozenGetPrivateField helper function
- Frees both obj and name references
- Returns exception if operation fails
- Pushes result value to stack
- In Zig: uses block expressions for POP
- In C: uses POP() macro and FROZEN_FREE
